sections.paragraph:
plur. עֲבֹתִים and עֲבֹתֹות subst, com. (fem. Jud. 15:14 ), something interwoven, intertwined; hence-

(1) a rope, Jud. 15:13 , 14 Jdg 15:14pl. bonds, Psa 2:3 Eze 3:25 4:8 .

(2) a braid, wreath, of small rods woven together, Exo 28:24 מַעֲשֵׂה עֲבֹת wreathen work, Exo 28:14.

(3) a branch with thick foliage, Eze 19:11 31:3 , 10 Eze 31:10, 14 Eze 31:14.
